calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather R. Stoneman for Dr. Philip Sullivan, Executor (via Zoom).

Ms. Stoneman reported to the Court that the final petition had been completed and mailed to her client for signature, as the client does not use email. The client confirmed receipt, signed the petition, and is in the process of returning it.

Ms. Stoneman stated that prior deficiencies raised by the Probate Examiner were now addressed. Specifically, notice had been given to the Thai consulate, and the notice included remote appearance instructions as required. Additionally, the final petition clarified that no memorandum of disposition of tangible personal property was left by the decedent, as referenced in the will.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to September 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Heather Stoneman, Esq., for Dr. Philip Sullivan.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update re the status of the Estate and status of a petition. The court confirms with counsel that the real property located at 357 Silver Avenue has been sold and the proceeds are in the trust. After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jul-15-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by Jul-01-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mrs. Stoneman stated that John Sullivan died on March 5, 2013, that Chuchep Pongglud died on September 20, 2019, and that she has heard of no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 6, 2012 is admitted to probate. Philip Sullivan is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. A hearing is set for May 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The personal representative shall file either a petition for final distribution, or a report on status of administration at least two weeks prior.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
